name: knowledge-coding-plugins
description: Claude Code (coding-surface) plugins for the subagentceo knowledge-engineering repo. The engineering counterpart to anthropics/knowledge-work-plugins (Cowork-surface) and anthropics/claude-plugins-official (first-party developer tooling): these plugins automate code-grounded, repo-changing workflows — crawl pipelines, vendor mirrors, delta PRs — that run inside a Claude Code session and push commits.

plugins.name: anduril-crawl-plugin
plugins.description: Deterministic, content-addressed (sha256) incremental crawler packaged as skills. Mirrors a vendor doc surface to CommonMark, detects new + changed pages against a manifest, and PRs only the delta. Two modes: markdown-native (llms.txt + sitemap.xml → fetch .md; e.g. code.claude.com, developer.anduril.com) and structured-metadata (JS/WebGL SPAs with no prose DOM → title + meta + Open Graph + JSON-LD; e.g. www.anduril.com).
